name: Shanghai LongYun Media Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai LongYun Media Group Co., Ltd. provides integrated advertising and media resource management services in China. It offers advertising services, including market research, brand management, creative and design, TVC production, communication strategy, and execution and evaluation. The company was formerly known as Shanghai LongYun Advertising & Media Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai LongYun Media Group Co., Ltd. in February 2019. Shanghai LongYun Media Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Shanghai, China.
